horoscope: Today's transits can help reveal a solution to a problem or a new angle to a situation, dear Aries, and it's helpful. There is strong energy for personal, home, and family matters. Getting your financial affairs in order can improve your life in multiple areas. You might find alternate ways of dealing with problem areas that turn out to work beautifully. A private matter or secret might reveal itself. Still, your attention often turns to networking, friendships, and connecting with your happiness goals today. Someone may be leaning on you for support or strength, and you are especially obliging.

You’re in great shape for guiding and supporting others today, dear Taurus. The process of exchange is interesting in itself to you now, perhaps a little less than the content. Still, you’re in fine shape for inventive thinking and communicating. You might get the chance to take care of outstanding problems and loose emotional ends, and you're likely to find some empowering support from loved ones or a sense that you're on top of things. Today's energies are strong for work, organization, and practical solutions to problems. Taking on a project that you once thought was not up your alley may serve to surprise you now, as it can be far more rewarding than you had imagined.

You might strengthen ties and find peace with your past today, dear Gemini, or at least a new understanding of a long-term issue. You might come up with a feasible idea for a career or public move. Work, business, and other practical ideas can be notable now. The Moon spends the day in your adventure and spirit sector, and you may not even need a real direction to inspire you; you simply want to do something constructive. You also benefit from an influence that can bring a positive learning experience into your life. Today's energies are good for making the most of a situation, and you can very well find just the right motivation to make improvements. The day favors steady progress, reliability, and small efforts to secure future endeavors.

Today's transits put you in an optimistic frame of mind, dear Cancer. Interactions and communications can be especially relevant, and perhaps inspirational. You’re thinking about ways to expand your life experience beyond the routine, and you can be particularly inspired by your prospects, new insights, and mind-expanding theories today. People are especially interested in your conversation, ideas, and opinions, and you may be leading the way in some manner among friends and associates. Energies are good for socializing and collaboration. There can be a nice feeling of equilibrium as your emotional needs seem to be in balance with the demands of the outside world. You're interested in making things run more smoothly, and you're looking at the important details that need attention in this regard. There is a stronger sense of what is good for you rather than simply what you want or think you need.

There can be engaging shared experiences that stand out today, dear Leo. You analyze, talk about, or pick apart the past to better understand the present. It's a fine time for mental insights, mostly revolving around your personal life, your intimate relationship with yourself, your awareness of your fears and attachments, and your dependencies on others. Ideas and strategies for better managing your life and dealing with problem areas can come to you in a great flash. Your mind is investigative, and your desire to understand a matter more deeply tends to dominate right now. The morning is a good time for the more creative side of your work or for organizing your space. You have an excellent eye for worthwhile projects or investments. Still, you can be quite focused on your social life or relationships today. A partner or special someone can help stir up your enthusiasm and build your confidence.

Today's transits are strong for analyzing, sorting, and organizing, dear Virgo. You could have an illuminating conversation with or about a partner. The tendency is to go over a problem to arrive at a new understanding, and it’s useful. You might share a problem or brainstorm successfully. Valuable feedback can be in the spotlight. Your performance matters more to you than usual today, but it's not anxious energy. In fact, you are quite happy to make improvements. Looking into health and wellness programs or ideas, and exploring what you might do to make the most of these things and your work can be successful. A person in your life may come through for you now, and this is helpful. Your attention to a relationship can have long-term benefits.

You enjoy putting your thoughts in order today, dear Libra, and conversations or ideas about work, routines, employees, or health matters can be in focus. You might gather information to help out others, and in the process, learn something important for yourself. Solving problems can be engaging and absorbing, and solutions are on the horizon. You can feel a growing need to mingle, reach out, share, and express your affections. You may be seeking activities in which you can create, compete, or play. Constructive conversations or activities with a partner or friend can figure strongly now. Today's energies are useful for taking a good look at what you can improve with your work, finances, or health. Good advice from someone you trust may be in the offing now.

Your interactions benefit from increased listening and attention today, dear Scorpio. As you learn more about the world around you, you feel more confident and connected. You’re willing to step a little outside of your comfort zone on a mental level. Fortunately, it's a day for gaining more clarity on a matter. You might discover something about a romantic or creative matter that changes your perspective, or you might help guide someone, and it’s rewarding. Seeing resources that you’ve overlooked in the past can figure strongly. You are especially aware of the details required to get a job done, which helps you make a dent in your "to do" list or whatever you're pursuing today. Your practical cleverness draws others to you today. You're also in a wonderful position to gain an advantage in your work. You are taking a special interest in the practical elements of a project, and your instinct for what has long-term worth is strong.

Today's transits are good for strength in the family unit or in relationships with people who are like family to you, dear Sagittarius. Important clarifications and greater insight can be in the spotlight. Exchanges in close relationships are helpful and rewarding, and you're in an especially reasonable and objective frame of mind. The Moon spends all day in your solar third house, and you're feeling out your needs for connecting, getting around, and pursuing your mental interests. With the Moon's connection with Pluto and Saturn early today, you are speaking with authority and may arrive at some meaningful conclusions. It's a fine time to teach or guide others, and to learn something constructive, yourself. Also, today and tomorrow, there can be improvements in the family dynamic or household, particularly in meeting responsibilities, which can be satisfying and stabilizing.

Today's transits are strong for getting to know more about yourself and your feelings through your conversations and musings, dear Capricorn. The benefits of a friend, partner, or support system become obvious, and you might enjoy helpful, clarifying ideas and communications. As well, you're more aware of the things that ground you, make you feel secure, and keep you focused on the moment. Efforts to organize and tidy or otherwise simplify your life can be in the spotlight. Today's energies are good for attention to practical details that help you improve or secure relationships and projects.

Today's transits are strong for gaining a greater understanding of your priorities and needs, dear Aquarius. You can enjoy more insight into your situation with new information incoming or at your disposal. It’s a good time to work on budgets or research a purchase. You seem particularly able to talk about practical matters and come up with real solutions to problems today. Constructive conversations can be in the spotlight. While the Moon in your sign tends to hype you up on some levels, you benefit most from a slower, steadier, and more straightforward approach to your life right now, and thinking up strategies for handling problem areas can be most successful and engaging.

Today's transits are strong for constructive thinking and sorting out your thoughts, dear Pisces. It’s a good time to find the information you need. A new understanding of a matter can give birth to an improved idea. Today's Moon can signal the need to keep challenging or demanding people and situations at bay. It's a time to recenter yourself. You may be able to connect with your feelings and stay very much anchored in the present. As well, you can very much enjoy meeting your responsibilities. A friend, sibling, or neighbor may come through for you. Be willing to consider letting go of a matter that's kept you from enjoying yourself, growing, and improving.
